title: Terramangas
description: Kitchen sink with trains for the amangas+ community.
body:
This modpack combines the creative freedom of a sandbox experience with the technical ingenuity of the Create Mod, all centered around constructing intricate rail networks and trains.

# Key Features:
- **Amplified Terrain Generation:** Explore stunning, larger-than-life biomes with dramatic cliffs, towering mountains, and deep valleys. These amplified landscapes provide the perfect backdrop for building expansive train systems and architectural marvels.
- **Train Building with Create Interactive:** Dive into Create Interactive to design fully functional trains. Transport goods, passengers, or even automate complex logistics across your world. From crafting train tracks and casings to setting up stations and signals, this modpack brings railroads to life like never before.
- **Multiplayer Optimized:** Designed around the multiplayer experience, this pack is perfect for multiplayer servers of around 10 players. Builders can focus on creating stunning structures, while tech enthusiasts can master automation and train systems.
- **Enhanced Immersion:** Amplified terrain is not just scenic—it challenges players to adapt their train networks to rugged environments. Build bridges over canyons, carve tunnels through mountains, or lay tracks across sprawling plains.

# Note:
To play on the server you need to manually install:
JJThunder King of the Hills (curseforge)
AE2InfinityBooster (modrinth)

Pregenerated Xaero's map is also available:
